entry.title: New: RES25-178 (Honolulu) — Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF FRESH FOOD GOODS VALUED AT $2,400 FROM HFA TO THE HONOLULU EMERGENCY SERVICES DEPARTMENT (HESD) IN APPRECIATION OF EMERGENCY MEDICAL SERVICES (EMS) PERSONNEL.

Latest action: Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.

View on the council site
